find: δ = TBD, α = 0.05, power = 0.80, required N = TBD

heading: ## Pre-registration plan
body:
- OSF ID: osf.io/TBD
- Planned date: 2026-07-01
- Tests: Test 1A, 2A, 3A, 4A will be individually pre-registered with full power analysis and analysis scripts.

heading: ## Sample size calculation
body:
Formula: n = (1.96 + 0.84)² · σ² / δ²
- α = 0.05, power = 0.80
- δ = 0.3 (R²), σ² = 1.0 (assumed)
- Required N = 1875
- Threshold N ≥ 2000 for falsification (Axiom M4)

heading: ## Risk matrix
body:
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|--------|------------|
| Insufficient sample size | Medium | High | Pre-register N ≥ 2000; interim analysis at N=1000 |
| Tissue weight prediction fails | High | High | Use multiple independent methods; cross-validate |
| Counter interaction misspecified | Medium | Medium | Test with γ=0 baseline; sensitivity analysis |
| Measurement error in biomarkers | Medium | Medium | Use validated assays; replicate measurements |
| Confounding by lifestyle factors | High | Low | Control for age, sex, BMI, smoking in regression |
| Pre-registration delay | Low | Medium | Set hard deadline 2026-07-01; backup plan for later date |

heading: ## Limitations
body:
- Pre-registration not yet completed (placeholder OSF ID)
- Sample size may be less than N ≥ 2000 for mortality test
- Tissue weight prediction method not fully validated
- Counter interaction terms (γ) assumed zero pending further data
- Only 5 counters currently defined; additional counters may be needed
- Validation limited to mouse models; human translation uncertain
- Power analysis for auxiliary tests (1A, 2A, 3A, 4A) uses placeholder values

heading: ## Consortium / partners
body:
- Lead institution: Georgia Longevity Alliance (Tbilisi, Georgia)
- Proposed partners:
  - TBD (mitochondrial assays)
  - TBD (telomere qFISH)
  - TBD (epigenetic clocks)
  - TBD (proteomics / CP measurements)
- Roles: sample collection, biomarker measurement, data analysis, pre-registration oversight
